location: Duskport — split: Salted Crown + Council Chambers + East Harbor

inventory: Leather armor (equipped, AC 12 + DEX — reinforced, from temple Op A)
3 receipts (INTEREST ONLY stamps — evidence of Ledger fraud)
mira.notes: Pip's debt resolved (Cassin closed the account). Mira's 75gp payments swallowed by interest — potential fraud case with Vael Orun. Served as corridor security during Valis Procedure. Wants a garden and a place of her own. Aspires to learn to stay instead of run. Darkest hour: discovering the Ledger was eating her payments.

aldric.notes: Delivered Partition Writ to Magistrate Sera Voss (S2). 4th anchor in Valis Procedure — held south arc through all 14 minutes, hands blistered, refused healing ('I want to remember what it cost'). Wants to return to Stonebrow Hall to teach. Darkest hour: held a mountain pass 3 days for a village already gone. Personal quest: a necromancer he intends to go after.

sylvara.notes: Lead anchor in Valis Procedure. Failed CON save at minute 4 (recovered via Orindel). Pulled Pip's entire quadrant for 19 seconds at minute 12 — nosebleed, carried 5-person load. Gave Pip her focus stone (river pebble). Wants to finish her notebook — the complete record. Darkest hour: leaving Aelindra knowing she may have given Thessara permission.

bram.notes: Anchor point 3 (east) in Valis Procedure — never flickered once. Absorbed overflow when Pip's arc collapsed. Sailed 3 days on a fish-oil ship because a pigeon told him to come. Held Duskport with Thessaly during S3. Wants to build a school for talented kids with no money. Darkest hour: military discharge — irrelevance, not dishonor.

thessaly.notes: Held Duskport command during S3 Aelindra operation. S4: neutralized Voss assassin (Deception 25, Sneak Attack 12 dmg non-lethal). Lured him to side corridor solo. House Aldenmere on her list. Expertise: Stealth + Deception.

orindel.notes: Chamber healer during Valis Procedure — used both spell slots (Healing Word on Sylvara min 4, Healing Word on Aldric min 8), then stood with no magic for 6 more minutes. Hand on Pip's shoulder kept him in the circle. Knows warding prayer ritual (force resistance, 4 creatures, 1 hour). Delivered Maret's letter to Veyra Solund. Street children list — Tomas's legacy. Wants a dog. Darkest hour: lost a boy named Tomas, age 9.

inventory: Leather armor (equipped, AC 12 + DEX — studded, from Drest)
pip.notes: Anchor point 4 (west) in Valis Procedure. Failed CON save at minute 12 (rolled 4), screamed, arc collapsed — hands never left the chalk. Sylvara caught him. Sustained 10:40 in practice, found the last 20 seconds when it mattered. Debt resolved. Wants to be a real wizard. Darkest hour: opening the fake spellbook and feeling confirmed as a fool.

zaryth.notes: Swapped plate armor for chain mail (AC 18→16) for stealth in sub-level 2. Held chamber door during entire 14-minute Valis Procedure. Gave speeches that moved the company to tears (multiple occasions). Carries ruined signet ring from a fallen house — 'I want to become the person that ring was made for.' Darkest hour: his house fell while he was away. Light: the company.

active_allies.vael_orun: Night-Priest, Temple of the Balanced Scale, Duskport. 10-year orchestrator. Ally.
active_allies.magistrate_voss: Sera Voss, Duskport city council. Running inquiry into House Aldenmere. Has Partition Writ + deed of civic trust + Harwick testimony.
active_allies.harwick: Former Aldenmere solicitor. Double agent with Vael Orun for 10 years. Free, retained for testimony.
active_allies.edric: Lord Edric Aldenmere. Staying in Aelindra, working with Veyra on Archive reform.
active_allies.veyra_solund: Interim Archivist-General of Aelindra. Sylvara's mentor (60 years). Confronted Thessara in the chamber.
active_allies.cassin_vael: Former Crimson Ledger collector. Closed Pip's account. Departed. 'You did something better.'

neutralized.thessara_kain: Former Archivist-General. Under house arrest in Aelindra. Testified. Chose redemption.
neutralized.serevane: Former A-G operative. Defected. Returned to Duskport for S4 — provided Calder's full 3-phase operational plan. Active ally.

threats.calder_aldenmere: House Aldenmere eldest son. Quiet in Duskport. Hasn't moved or surrendered. 'Father had limits. Calder doesn't.'
threats.vel_noctis: Larger network beyond Duskport and Aelindra. Origins predate current operation.
threats.unchained_compact: Sub-order within Aelindra. Thessara was last active leader. Remnants unknown.

custody.vn_op3: ESCAPED — broken out of holding cells by professional crew. Being moved to east harbor ship, midnight departure.
custody.guard_3: ESCAPED — broken out of holding cells by professional crew. Being moved to east harbor ship, midnight departure.
custody.rooftop_watcher: ESCAPED — broken out of holding cells by professional crew. Being moved to east harbor ship, midnight departure.
custody.drest: Fixer. Unconscious, in custody at Ashward warehouse. Link to Calder. Bald, heavyset, missing 2 fingers left hand.
custody.temple_lookout: Unconscious, in custody at temple (Guard Pell watching).
custody.temple_op_a: Unconscious, in custody at temple (Guard Pell watching).
custody.temple_op_b: Surrendered, cooperating, in custody at temple. Provided full intel on Drest and the operation.

calders_plan.phase_1: Evidence burn (temple) — FAILED. Original ledger saved. ~60% records intact. Stolen crate recovered.
calders_plan.phase_2: Captive extraction — FAILED. 3 captives recaptured, separate cells. Ship seized. Harbor chain up.
calders_plan.phase_3: Assassinate Magistrate Voss — FAILED. Assassin neutralized by Thessaly. Poisoned stiletto + abjuration amulet seized.

session_4_active.calder_status: Confronted at Salted Crown. Not resisting. Awaiting handoff to authorities.

seized_items.sellable_weapons: ~85gp estimated (5x short swords, 2x hand axes, 1x light crossbow)

session_4_active.inside_leak: Unknown. Someone drew detailed temple floor plan for Drest. Inside the inquiry.

random_events.result: Ship captain revealed Calder's escape plan

session_3_summary.started: Duskport, morning after Session 2, anonymous note from Edric
session_3_summary.ended: Duskport, harbor dock, party reunited after Aelindra operation
key_events: Serevane defected, provided full sub-level 2 intelligence
Party earned 256gp in Aelindra over 6 days while gathering intel
Valis Procedure executed — 14 minutes, 3 CON save rounds, Sylvara carried Pip's load 19 seconds
Thessara Kain chose redemption, testified, under house arrest
Deep character bonding on voyage home — dreams, aspirations, darkest hours shared
